---
title: "XOR Training Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    self-contained: true
---

```{ojs}
// ── Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
data_raw = await FileAttachment("dashboard2.csv").csv({ typed: true })
metadata = await FileAttachment("metadata2.json").json()

// Derived constants
all_iters  = [...new Set(data_raw.map(d => d.iteration))].sort((a,b) => a - b)
n_iter     = all_iters.at(-1)
run_labels = metadata.map(m => m.label)

// Composite run key — repeat alone is not unique across configurations
function run_key(m) {
  return `${m.repeat}|${m.hidden_neurons}|${m.learning_rate}`
}

// Match a data row to a metadata entry by composite key
function row_matches(d, m) {
  return d.repeat         === m.repeat         &&
         d.hidden_neurons === m.hidden_neurons  &&
         d.learning_rate  === m.learning_rate
}

// Global loss range across all data — for clamped colorscale
loss_min = Math.min(...data_raw.map(d => d.loss))
loss_max = Math.max(...data_raw.map(d => d.loss))
```

```{ojs}
// ── Run selector ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof selected_labels = Inputs.checkbox(run_labels, {
  label:  "Training runs (select up to 3)",
  value:  [run_labels[0]]
})

// Clamp to 3 selections — warn if over
{
  if (selected_labels.length > 3) {
    return html`<p style="color:#f0883e;font-family:monospace;font-size:12px">
      ⚠ Maximum 3 runs — only the first 3 will be shown.
    </p>`
  }
}

// Effective selection: at most 3
sel_labels = selected_labels.slice(0, 3)

// Map labels back to full metadata objects — composite key for filtering
sel_runs = sel_labels.map(l => metadata.find(m => m.label === l))
```

```{ojs}
// ── Playback controls ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof playing = Inputs.toggle({ label: "▶ Play", value: false })

viewof slider_iter = Inputs.range([1, n_iter], {
  label: "Iteration",
  step:  1,
  value: 1
})
```

```{ojs}
// ── Animation clock ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Fixed at 20 iterations/s — avoids browser overload from excessive redraws
SPEED = 20

clock = {
  let iter  = slider_iter ?? 1;
  let last  = null;
  let frame;

  const ticker = (resolve) => {
    const step = (ts) => {
      if (!playing) { iter = slider_iter; last = null; resolve(iter); }
      else {
        if (last === null) last = ts;
        const elapsed = ts - last;
        const ms_per  = 1000 / SPEED;
        if (elapsed >= ms_per) {
          const steps = Math.floor(elapsed / ms_per);
          iter  = (iter + steps) > n_iter ? 1 : iter + steps;
          last  = ts;
          resolve(iter);
        }
      }
      frame = requestAnimationFrame(step);
    };
    frame = requestAnimationFrame(step);
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(frame);
  };

  return Generators.observe(ticker);
}

eff_iter = playing ? clock : slider_iter
```

```{ojs}
// ── Colour palette — one colour per run slot ──────────────────────────────────
COLOURS = ["#f0883e", "#58a6ff", "#3fb950"]

// Full trail from iteration 1 up to eff_iter for a given run
function trail_data(run) {
  const iter = eff_iter ?? 1
  return data_raw.filter(d =>
    row_matches(d, run) && d.iteration <= iter
  )
}

// Current point for a given run
function current_point(run) {
  const iter = eff_iter ?? 1
  const pts = data_raw
    .filter(d => row_matches(d, run) && d.iteration <= iter)
    .sort((a,b) => b.iteration - a.iteration)
  return pts[0] ?? null
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Plot 1: Loss vs iteration ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
loss_plot = {
  const iter = eff_iter ?? 1

  const traces = sel_runs.flatMap((run, i) => {
    const col  = COLOURS[i]
    const name = sel_labels[i]

    // Loss line up to current iteration only
    const active = data_raw.filter(r =>
      row_matches(r, run) && r.iteration <= iter
    )
    const active_line = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
      x: active.map(r => r.iteration),
      y: active.map(r => r.loss),
      line: { color: col, width: 2 },
      name,
      showlegend: true,
      hovertemplate: `iter %{x}<br>loss %{y:.4f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    }

    // Current point marker
    const pt = current_point(run)
    const marker = pt ? {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: [pt.iteration], y: [pt.loss],
      marker: { color: col, size: 8, line: { color: "#fff", width: 1.5 } },
      showlegend: false,
      hovertemplate: `iter %{x}<br>loss %{y:.4f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    } : null

    return marker ? [active_line, marker] : [active_line]
  })

  // Vertical rule at current iteration
  const rule = {
    type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
    x: [iter, iter],
    y: [0, loss_max],
    line: { color: "#7d8590", width: 1, dash: "dot" },
    showlegend: false, hoverinfo: "skip",
  }

  const layout = {
    paper_bgcolor: "#0d1117",
    plot_bgcolor:  "#161b22",
    font:  { family: "JetBrains Mono, monospace", size: 11, color: "#e6edf3" },
    title: { text: "Loss vs iteration", font: { size: 13 }, x: 0.04 },
    xaxis: { title: "Iteration", gridcolor: "#30363d", zerolinecolor: "#30363d",
             range: [1, n_iter] },
    yaxis: { title: "Loss", gridcolor: "#30363d", zerolinecolor: "#30363d",
             range: [0, loss_max] },
    legend: { bgcolor: "#0d1117", bordercolor: "#30363d", borderwidth: 1 },
    margin: { t: 40, r: 20, b: 50, l: 60 },
    height: 320,
  }

  return { traces: [...traces, rule], layout }
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Plot 2: Parameter space (param_0 × param_1) ───────────────────────────────
param_plot = {
  const traces = sel_runs.flatMap((run, i) => {
    const col  = COLOURS[i]
    const name = sel_labels[i]
    const trl  = trail_data(run)
    const pt   = current_point(run)

    // Trail line
    const trail_line = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
      x: trl.map(r => r.param_0),
      y: trl.map(r => r.param_1),
      line: { color: col, width: 1.5 },
      opacity: 0.45,
      showlegend: false,
      hoverinfo: "skip",
    }

    // Trail points coloured by loss, colorscale clamped globally
    const trail_pts = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: trl.map(r => r.param_0),
      y: trl.map(r => r.param_1),
      marker: {
        color:        trl.map(r => r.loss),
        colorscale:   "YlOrRd",
        reversescale: true,
        cmin:         loss_min,
        cmax:         loss_max,
        size:         4,
        opacity:      0.7,
        showscale:    i === 0,
        colorbar: i === 0 ? {
          title: "Loss", thickness: 12, len: 0.6,
          tickfont: { size: 10 },
        } : undefined,
      },
      name,
      showlegend: true,
      hovertemplate: `param_0 %{x:.3f}<br>param_1 %{y:.3f}<br>loss %{marker.color:.4f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    }

    // Current point
    const marker = pt ? {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: [pt.param_0], y: [pt.param_1],
      marker: { color: col, size: 10, symbol: "circle",
                line: { color: "#fff", width: 1.5 } },
      showlegend: false,
      hovertemplate: `iter ${eff_iter ?? 1}<br>param_0 %{x:.3f}<br>param_1 %{y:.3f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    } : null

    return marker ? [trail_line, trail_pts, marker] : [trail_line, trail_pts]
  })

  // Axis ranges fixed across all data
  const all_p0   = data_raw.map(d => d.param_0)
  const all_p1   = data_raw.map(d => d.param_1)
  const pad      = 0.3
  const p0_range = [Math.min(...all_p0) - pad, Math.max(...all_p0) + pad]
  const p1_range = [Math.min(...all_p1) - pad, Math.max(...all_p1) + pad]

  const layout = {
    paper_bgcolor: "#0d1117",
    plot_bgcolor:  "#161b22",
    font:  { family: "JetBrains Mono, monospace", size: 11, color: "#e6edf3" },
    title: { text: "Parameter space — w₁ × w₂ (neuron 1)", font: { size: 13 }, x: 0.04 },
    xaxis: { title: "param_0  (w₁)", gridcolor: "#30363d",
             zerolinecolor: "#30363d", range: p0_range },
    yaxis: { title: "param_1  (w₂)", gridcolor: "#30363d",
             zerolinecolor: "#30363d", range: p1_range, scaleanchor: "x" },
    legend: { bgcolor: "#0d1117", bordercolor: "#30363d", borderwidth: 1 },
    margin: { t: 40, r: 60, b: 50, l: 60 },
    height: 420,
  }

  return { traces, layout }
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Render ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Plotly.react diffs the existing plot rather than rebuilding from scratch,
// which is essential for smooth animation without crashing the page.

Plot1 = {
  const div = document.createElement("div")
  await Plotly.newPlot(div, loss_plot.traces, loss_plot.layout,
    { responsive: true, displayModeBar: false })
  return div
}

{
  if (Plot1) Plotly.react(Plot1, loss_plot.traces, loss_plot.layout)
}

Plot2 = {
  const div = document.createElement("div")
  await Plotly.newPlot(div, param_plot.traces, param_plot.layout,
    { responsive: true, displayModeBar: false })
  return div
}

{
  if (Plot2) Plotly.react(Plot2, param_plot.traces, param_plot.layout)
}

Plot3 = {
  const div = document.createElement("div")
  await Plotly.newPlot(div, param_plot2.traces, param_plot2.layout,
    { responsive: true, displayModeBar: false })
  return div
}

{
  if (Plot3) Plotly.react(Plot3, param_plot2.traces, param_plot2.layout)
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Plot 3: Parameter space (param_3 × param_4) ───────────────────────────────
param_plot2 = {
  const traces = sel_runs.flatMap((run, i) => {
    const col  = COLOURS[i]
    const name = sel_labels[i]
    const trl  = trail_data(run)
    const pt   = current_point(run)

    const trail_line = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
      x: trl.map(r => r.param_3),
      y: trl.map(r => r.param_4),
      line: { color: col, width: 1.5 },
      opacity: 0.45,
      showlegend: false,
      hoverinfo: "skip",
    }

    const trail_pts = {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: trl.map(r => r.param_3),
      y: trl.map(r => r.param_4),
      marker: {
        color:        trl.map(r => r.loss),
        colorscale:   "YlOrRd",
        reversescale: true,
        cmin:         loss_min,
        cmax:         loss_max,
        size:         4,
        opacity:      0.7,
        showscale:    i === 0,
        colorbar: i === 0 ? {
          title: "Loss", thickness: 12, len: 0.6,
          tickfont: { size: 10 },
        } : undefined,
      },
      name,
      showlegend: true,
      hovertemplate: `param_3 %{x:.3f}<br>param_4 %{y:.3f}<br>loss %{marker.color:.4f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    }

    const marker = pt ? {
      type: "scatter", mode: "markers",
      x: [pt.param_3], y: [pt.param_4],
      marker: { color: col, size: 10, symbol: "circle",
                line: { color: "#fff", width: 1.5 } },
      showlegend: false,
      hovertemplate: `iter ${eff_iter ?? 1}<br>param_3 %{x:.3f}<br>param_4 %{y:.3f}<extra>${name}</extra>`,
    } : null

    return marker ? [trail_line, trail_pts, marker] : [trail_line, trail_pts]
  })

  const all_p3   = data_raw.map(d => d.param_3)
  const all_p4   = data_raw.map(d => d.param_4)
  const pad      = 0.3
  const p3_range = [Math.min(...all_p3) - pad, Math.max(...all_p3) + pad]
  const p4_range = [Math.min(...all_p4) - pad, Math.max(...all_p4) + pad]

  const layout = {
    paper_bgcolor: "#0d1117",
    plot_bgcolor:  "#161b22",
    font:  { family: "JetBrains Mono, monospace", size: 11, color: "#e6edf3" },
    title: { text: "Parameter space — w₁ × w₂ (neuron 2)", font: { size: 13 }, x: 0.04 },
    xaxis: { title: "param_3  (w₁)", gridcolor: "#30363d",
             zerolinecolor: "#30363d", range: p3_range },
    yaxis: { title: "param_4  (w₂)", gridcolor: "#30363d",
             zerolinecolor: "#30363d", range: p4_range, scaleanchor: "x" },
    legend: { bgcolor: "#0d1117", bordercolor: "#30363d", borderwidth: 1 },
    margin: { t: 40, r: 60, b: 50, l: 60 },
    height: 420,
  }

  return { traces, layout }
}
```

```{ojs}
// ── Status bar ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
html`<div style="
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #7d8590;
  margin: 8px 0 16px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 32px;
">
  <span>iteration <strong style="color:#e6edf3">${eff_iter}</strong> / ${n_iter}</span>
  ${sel_runs.map((run, i) => {
    const pt = current_point(run)
    return pt
      ? html`<span style="color:${COLOURS[i]}">${sel_labels[i].split(" (")[0]}
               — loss <strong>${pt.loss.toFixed(4)}</strong></span>`
      : ""
  })}
</div>`
```

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.32.0.min.js"></script>
```
